symptom: PubChem lookup by compound name may return incorrect structures if names are ambiguous or non-standard; name-to-structure derivation error rate was 1.62% in the cited work.
Repair cannot distinguish between wrong annotations that happen to match the measured parent mass (e.g., isomers with identical monoisotopic mass); these will pass validation undetected.
Salt ion dissociation patterns during ionization are not fully predictable; repair assumes common salt/adduct combinations and may miss uncommon cases.
Collision energy and instrument type metadata are not standardized or validated by the current pipeline, limiting downstream cross-library comparison.
Fragment ion matching to annotated structures is not yet implemented; repair focuses on precursor-level annotations only.
